goal: RSA-1024 legacy signature — historically used for identity attestation; now below minimum security threshold.
failure_modes: RSA-1024 factored in 2010 (768-bit) — 1024-bit now below NIST minimum
Quantum adversary breaks RSA factoring (Shor's algorithm)
No post-quantum migration path declared — SC5 violation
composition_rules: Do not use — below minimum key size (NIST requires >= 2048 for RSA through 2030)
Retire immediately; replace with Ed25519 or ML-DSA
